title: xyris neglecta
intro: Xyris neglecta, also known as the Yellow-eyed Grass, is a species of plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant contains compounds like saponins and flavonoids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Xyris neglecta can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used to calm coughs and relieve congestion.
